case_title: HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. MICHELLE WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - 5-DAY NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MICHELLE DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 415 ROSE ST. S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
